title: stenostephanus sprucei
intro: Stenostephanus sprucei, also known as Mexican mint or Mexican oregano, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, which is commonly known for its fragrant and aromatic leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stenostephanus sprucei include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are typically dried and used as a tea or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
